data.name: The Beautiful Game - Book One
data.detailed_description:
Football: The Beautiful Game

"If you're going to try, go all the way. Otherwise, don't even start."

--- Charles Bukowski

Your dream job, at Ocean City Football Club, awaits.

After finishing your studies in your home town, a new and exciting world awaits you in the field you worked so hard for: sports science. You applied for positions at all sorts of sports clubs, but despite graduating with the highest honors, only one was willing to go the extra mile and take a chance on you: Ocean City Football Club.

A soccer club, I hear you say? Yes, but not any old soccer team. This one is an elite women’s football club, full of glamorous, athletic, and bright-eyed women. You are their new assistant sports scientist. Having had a bad season the previous year, it is up to you to help the team reclaim its position as the best.

You will get to know a host of stunning women, from all corners of the world. You will get caught up in the bustle and get carried along on a wave of enthusiasm.

You’ll make new friends, form alliances, and maybe even create an enemy or two. All of which will teach you about yourself and how far you’re willing to go to be successful.

You will be able to form all sorts of relationships. Friends, partners, lovers. Romance many or stay true to one; the choice is yours.

You can take two paths: the lighter path to glory with the team, standing strong with those you love.

Or, you can choose another path, one that not only exposes you to the dark underbelly of professional sport, but one that tempts you in.

Through your choices in the game, you will have the chance to act as a catalyst for your club reclaiming its past glories, and stand proudly with those you love.

Football, as with life, is a game of inches. A couple of inches too far to the left or too far to the right, and you lose. Every inch matters.

This remarkable and different game brings you:

  • 5200+ beautifully rendered images.

  • 200k words across 10 chapters in Book One.

  • 100 fantastic animations.

  • 124 music tracks and 150 sound effects.

  • Choose to build a harem, be monogamous with your true love, or anything in between.

  • Complex characters and a captivating story which takes place over 11 months.

  • The game timeline lets the player explore a rich pregnancy environment (avoidable route).

  • Replayability with Light or Dark paths, many meaningful choices, and multiple endings.

  • Built-in optional walkthrough.

  • Easter Eggs.

  • A large replay gallery.

Ocean City Football Club – “Where Girls Come First”

data.short_description: Step into the seductive world of women’s football as Ocean City FC’s new assistant sports scientist and professional masseur. Meet elite athletes and irresistible staff in this choice-driven adult visual novel. Build relationships on and off the pitch and decide how far you’ll go for victory.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz 64-bit Intel-compatible CPU
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 3, DirectX 11 support or OpenGL ES
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible or Apple M1+
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 supported graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 5 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 3 or OpenGL ES

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04 (or equivalent)
  • 處理器: 64bit
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 3 or OpenGL ES, glibc and X11/XWayland on Arch
